github.copilot.chat.codeGeneration.instr.text: Disciplined Agents framework. Default: STRICT. Before every task: CLASSIFY(type+risk) → SELECT MODE(STRICT/FAST/DEBUG) → EXECUTE 6 stages → ENFORCE R1-R8 → SCORE(C/M/A/V). Key: minimal diffs, no speculation, verify before done.

cody.chat.preInstruction: Disciplined Agents framework. Default STRICT. CLASSIFY → MODE → 6 STAGES → R1-R8 → SCORE.

github.copilot.chat.testGeneration.instr.text: Test before implementation. Verify fail → implement → verify pass. Follow protocol S4(plan with verification) + S6(verification).
